name: thread-memory
description: Persistent per-thread memory for coding agents, with one-command local installation for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Persist durable context for each agent conversation
interface.longDescription: Thread Memory gives coding agents a durable README per thread or workspace, so they can read current context before work and update progress before finishing.
defaultPrompt: Use Thread Memory for this session.
Resume this project with durable context.
